task: Implement the following plan: # Plan: Add Missing Agent Logos + Show Generated Files Per Agent ## Context The welcome page and agent selection UI currently only has inline SVG logos for Claude, Cursor, and GitHub Copilot. OpenAI Codex and OpenCode are missing logos despite having SVG files available in `frontend/assets/agents/`. Additionally, when users select a target coding agent, there's no indication of which files that agent can generate — making it harder for users to understand what each agent produces. ## Changes ### 1. Add OpenCode and OpenAI Codex logos to `AgentLogos.tsx` **File**: `frontend/src/components/AgentLogos.tsx` - Add `OpenCodeLogo` component (convert SVG from `frontend/assets/agents/opencode-logo.svg` to React inline SVG) - Add `OpenAICodexLogo` component (convert SVG from `frontend/assets/agents/openai-codex-logo.svg` to React inline SVG) - Add entries to `agentLogoMap`: - `"opencode"` → `` - `"codex"` → `` ### 2. Define agent-to-files mapping **File**: `frontend/src/components/AgentLogos.tsx` (or a new shared constant near the logo map) Add a `AGENT_GENERATED_FILES` constant mapping agent keys to their generated file paths: ```typescript export const AGENT_GENERATED_FILES: Record = { "agents-md": ["AGENTS.md"], "claude-code": ["CLAUDE.md", ".claude/rules", ".claude/skills"], "claude": ["CLAUDE.md", ".claude/rules", ".claude/skills"], "github-copilot": [".github/copilot-instructions.md"], "cursor": [".cursor/rules", ".cursor/skills"], "codex": ["AGENTS.md", "codex.md"], "opencode": ["AGENTS.md"], }; ``` ### 3. Show generated files below evaluation provider dropdown **File**: `frontend/src/components/RepositoryUrlInput.tsx` After the provider `
Mention that github also create ".github/instructions" and ".github/skills"
user_feedback_text: Mention that github also create ".github/instructions" and ".github/skills"
